not_found: This product could not be found or has been deleted.
access_denied: You do not have access to this product.
deleted_soft: Product deactivated. The associated campaign history has been preserved.
used_in_campaign: This product is used in an active campaign. Please complete or cancel the campaign before deleting it.
invalid_files: The uploaded files are invalid. Please check the format and size.
own_products_only: You can only manage your own products.
campaign_access_only: You can only view products from campaigns you participated in.
